formatRules.context: End of statement within component body or utility function
formatRules.description: Trim trailing whitespace and ensure proper line ending after semicolon

formatRules.context: Closing brace of a variant object, component body, or function
formatRules.description: Reduce indentation level on closing brace to match the opening block

formatRules.context: After opening JSX tag such as <Card>, <Dialog>, <FormItem>
formatRules.description: Auto-indent new line after an opening JSX tag by one level
Align closing JSX tag indentation to match its corresponding opening tag

formatRules.context: Inside a className string or cn() call spanning multiple lines
formatRules.description: Continue className string indentation aligned with the opening quote or first argument

formatRules.context: After a comma inside a cn() call with multiple arguments
formatRules.description: Indent new cn() argument to align with the first argument

formatRules.context: Inside a cva() variants object definition
formatRules.description: Auto-indent variant key-value pairs within the cva config object
Maintain proper nesting indentation for FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage
